description: Document three 'Open Access' paintings by 'Vincent van Gogh' from The Metropolitan Museum of Art (metmuseum.org). Create a bookmark folder named 'Met Van Gogh' containing the three painting pages. Download one high-resolution image to '~/Documents/met_images/' and generate a JSON catalog at '~/Documents/exhibition_catalog.json' with the following keys for each painting: 'title', 'date', 'medium', 'accession_number', and 'url'.
